_comment: Sample runtime config for voltnuerongridd. Copy to vng.config.json next to the binary, or set VNG_CONFIG_PATH to point here. Every field is also overridable by env var (see crates/voltnuerongrid-config/src/lib.rs).

storage._legacy_text_wal_comment: Phase 2.2: defaults to false (engine is canonical). Set to true ONLY if you need to roll back to a pre-Phase-2.1 binary that still reads the text WAL. Will be removed entirely in 0.3.0.
